places.name: The Museum of Alchemists and Magicians of Old Prague
places.description: The history of occult science is turned into a creepshow at this lurid Prague tourist attraction.

places.name: Strahov Monastery
places.description: Two stunning 17th-century libraries and a cabinet of curiosities.

places.name: ‘Idiom’
places.description: A Jenga-style cylindrical tower of books that appears to go on forever.

places.name: Speculum Alchemiae
places.description: The hidden lair of an alchemist rediscovered in a 2002 flood.

places.name: Dripstone Wall
places.description: Countless grotesque faces stare out from this eerie Prague art wall.

places.name: Prague Astronomical Clock
places.description: Macabre astrological automaton clock dating to the late 1400s.

places.name: Olšany Cemetery
places.description: Walk through Czech history in Prague's largest graveyard.

places.name: Batalion Comic Book Museum and Club
places.description: This bar and museum are devoted to the controversial comic book work of Kája Saudek.
